name: dengxuan/vertex-php
description: PHP (Swoole) implementation of Vertex. Wire format and transport contract are defined by the Vertex spec repo (dengxuan/Vertex), pinned via scripts/.spec-ref.

scripts-descriptions.lint: Check code style (php-cs-fixer, no changes made).
scripts-descriptions.analyse: Run PHPStan static analysis on src/.
scripts-descriptions.check: Run lint + analyse + test — the full local gate before pushing.
scripts-descriptions.sync-protos: Re-vendor protos from the pinned spec SHA and regenerate message classes.
